description_long: This is an adult male figure with a muscular build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is wearing a fitted helmet, short pants that reach just above the knees, and tall boots that cover the lower legs. The upper body is bare, revealing a natural skin tone with some shading and muscle definition, while the arms and legs show subtle anatomical details. The figure's face is neutral, and the head is covered by a snug helmet. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian or possibly athletic outfit, suitable for urban or outdoor environments.
description: A muscular adult male figure in a helmet, short pants, and tall boots, standing upright with arms outstretched. The upper body is bare, showing anatomical detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bare chest, helmet, short pants, and tall boots, with arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, facial features, and the side of the boots and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back muscles, helmet, and the back of the shorts and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, similar to the left, with visible arm and leg contours.
attribute_clothing_type: helmet, short fitted pants, tall boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
